{{Infobox character
| name = Lysander Torannus
| aliases = Overlord Lysander, Lysander
| siblings = {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora}}
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|psychic scream}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Overlord}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]]}}{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|, Sarin-tribe}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|scholar}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

''See also: [[Lysander Torannus Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Lysander Torannus is an [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]] and a prominent figure within the [[Sarin tribe]]. Recognized as a premier traveler of his kind, he possesses a profound connection to his flock of sparrows, which he uses for reconnaissance. While highly skilled in the art of [[Traveling]] and possessing significant academic knowledge, he is noted for his lack of political finesse and creativity. He has pledged his loyalty to [[Talos]], the last true [[Damascan]] heir, with the shared ambition of establishing their rule over the world. Despite his status as an Overlord and his contributions to various causes in [[Damasca]], he has faced significant setbacks, including being imprisoned in a crystal coffin and later being declared a traitor by the [[Damascan]] successor. He is also the brother of Overlord [[Feiora Torannus]].}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander Torannus is a scholarly Overlord and [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]] characterized by his chiseled features, golden hair, and feathered buckskin attire. Having maintained a realm of his own, he spent years orchestrating a long-term plot against King [[Zakareth]]. During an ambush, the man who claims to have seen the future utilized a psychic scream from his hands while accompanied by a flock of sparrows. Following an attempt to assassinate a royal Heir, he was encased within a translucent coffin of milky white crystal. Ultimately, Lysander sent word that the moment for his strike had finally arrived.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">18</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander is an Overlord who wears scholarly spectacles and a feathered buckskin outfit.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander has golden hair and chiseled features.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c3" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lysander Torannus]] is an Overlord.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lysander Torannus]] is an [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander has a realm.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander has been planning against King [[Zakareth]] for years.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander is an Overlord who has given his allegiance to [[Talos]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander is an [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander is a scholarly-looking man in soft buckskin decorated with feathers.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander is an Overlord.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander has a flock of sparrows flying around his head.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander is described as a scholarly man.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander can produce a psychic scream from his hands.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c18" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander was involved in an ambush.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lysander Torannus]] attempted to assassinate a royal Heir.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Lysander Torannus]] claimed to have seen the future.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Lysander is an Overlord who was encased in a solid, translucent coffin of milky white crystal.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Overlord Lysander sent a message that the time for their strike had come.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c21">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Lysander is Feiora's brother and an [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c4">''City of Light'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Lysander was the premier [[Sarin]]-tribe [[Avernus]] [[Traveler]] in the nation.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c7">''City of Light'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Feiora previously attempted to rally other Overlords to force the release of Lysander.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“No, wait! I’ve seen the future! I can show you what is to come!”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Scholars]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Travelers]]
